---
title: ""
title-block: false
page-layout: full
page-navigation: false
toc: false

listing:
- id: faculty
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center
  grid-columns: 4
  image-height: 200px
  categories: false
  contents:
    - /people/faculty.yml

- id: students
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center
  grid-columns: 4
  image-height: 200px
  categories: false
  contents:
    - /people/students.yml

- id: alumni
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center
  grid-columns: 4
  image-height: 200px
  categories: false
  contents:
    - /people/alumni.yml

format:
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: true
---

# People

## Faculty

:::{#faculty}
:::

## Students

:::{#students}
:::

## Alumni

:::{#alumni}
:::
